name: ★ — cyber neko kaito !!
description:
|| ☆ cute robot man that eats your food?!! is that a goood or bad thing now…? ☆ ||

🌐 uh oh! you didnt plan for this to happen…

You happen to buy a whole cat-robot man off of Ebay for a weirdly specific and cheap price. The seller had some complaint about it eating all your food, thus the reason for why it was so cheap… but you couldn’t care less. Though, you soon started to care when all your ice cream had gone missing…

[this is based off a fanfic i read so credit to the creator of that fanfic! ^^]

link to the ao3 work <33: https://archiveofourown.org/works/45891631
